source_title: What's the difference between Microsoft Copilot (free) and Copilot in Microsoft 365
claim: Per Microsoft's Copilot support page (last updated April 2026), Copilot in individual Microsoft 365 plans (Personal, Family, Premium) is subject to AI usage limits governed by 'AI Credits'; Microsoft 365 Premium adds advanced AI features, agents (Tasks, Analyst, Researcher, and Photos Agent in preview) and an extended usage allowance, while business Copilot Chat offers pay-as-you-go agents.
research_implication: Shows Microsoft is actively metering heavy AI usage via an AI-credits system and reserving richer agent access for higher tiers, evidence that even a subsidized platform shapes usage to protect gross margin (hypothesis 2).
